_comment: Documented intentional deviations from Codex's primitive→semantic mappings. Read by scripts/codex-audit.mjs — tokens listed here are surfaced in a 'Documented deviations' section instead of 'Drift summary'. Suffix ':light' or ':dark' to scope to one mode.

primitives.red-999: Citizen drops Codex's -999 out-of-band diff highlight stops
primitives.yellow-999: Citizen drops Codex's -999 out-of-band diff highlight stops
primitives.green-999: Citizen drops Codex's -999 out-of-band diff highlight stops
primitives.blue-999: Citizen drops Codex's -999 out-of-band diff highlight stops
primitives.red-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L (vs Codex's ~26% L) so subtle dark backgrounds sit ~5% L above Citizen's deeper canvas
primitives.orange-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.yellow-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.lime-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.green-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.blue-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.purple-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.pink-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.maroon-1000: Citizen retunes chromatic -1000 stops to ~16% L for canvas-relative subtlety
primitives.red-50: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-100: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-200: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-300: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-400: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-500: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-600: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-700: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-800: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.red-900: Citizen retunes the red ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.green-50: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.green-100: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.green-200: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.green-300: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.green-400: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels

primitives.green-800: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.green-900: Citizen retunes the green ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels

primitives.yellow-100: Citizen retunes the yellow ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels
primitives.yellow-200: Citizen retunes the yellow ramp to a Citizen-specific hue/chroma at Codex L levels

semantics.border-color-error: Citizen uses softer state borders (rest one stop above the subtle bg, communication via bg/icon/text)
semantics.color-visited: All link variants routed through progressive accent (no purple distinction)
semantics.color-visited--hover: All link variants routed through progressive accent
semantics.color-visited--active: All link variants routed through progressive accent
semantics.color-destructive--visited: All red-link variants routed through destructive (no maroon distinction)
semantics.color-destructive--visited--hover: All red-link variants routed through destructive
semantics.color-destructive--visited--active: All red-link variants routed through destructive
semantics.color-content-added: Citizen uses MediaWiki diff convention (green for added) over Codex's -999 highlight stops
semantics.color-content-removed: Citizen uses MediaWiki diff convention (red for removed) over Codex's -999 highlight stops
semantics.border-color-content-added: Citizen uses MediaWiki diff convention (green for added) over Codex's -999 highlight stops
semantics.border-color-content-removed: Citizen uses MediaWiki diff convention (red for removed) over Codex's -999 highlight stops
semantics.background-color-content-added: Citizen uses MediaWiki diff convention (green for added) over Codex's -999 highlight stops
semantics.background-color-content-removed: Citizen uses MediaWiki diff convention (red for removed) over Codex's -999 highlight stops
